spec.objective: Add chart values for the Codex subagent image reference and the OpenAI credential Secret name so operators have first-class Helm surface for both. charts/tide/values.yaml gains images.codexSubagent (repository + tag, mirroring images.tideReporter shape) and a codexProviderSecretName key that documents the expected Secret name carrying OPENAI_API_KEY. No chart template changes are required — per-level image and ProviderSecretRef are Project-spec fields, not chart-managed ConfigMap keys — but the values additions provide clear guidance and enable future chart-managed defaults.
